# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources

  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging-sqlserver
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Server

  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging-appdb
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Database

  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    defaultValue: sqladmin
    metadata:
      description: Administrator login for the SQL Server

  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    defaultValue: "AzureSQL2024!"
    metadata:
      description: Administrator password for the SQL Server

  skuName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: S1
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
      - S2
      - S3
      - P1
      - P2
    metadata:
      description: SKU name for the database

  skuTier:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - Standard
      - Premium
    metadata:
      description: SKU tier for the database

  maxSizeBytes:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 268435456000
    metadata:
      description: Maximum size of the database in bytes (default 250GB)

  devIpAddress1:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 203.0.113.10
    metadata:
      description: First developer IP address

  devIpAddress2:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 203.0.113.20
    metadata:
      description: Second developer IP address

  devIpAddress3:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 203.0.113.30
    metadata:
      description: Third developer IP address

  devOfficeIpRangeStart:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 198.51.100.0
    metadata:
      description: Development office IP range start

  devOfficeIpRangeEnd:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 198.51.100.255
    metadata:
      description: Development office IP range end

  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging
    allowedValues:
      - staging
      - development
      - testing
    metadata:
      description: Environment name

variables:
  sqlServerFullName: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  databaseFullName: "[concat(parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), '-', parameters('environment'))]"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[variables('sqlServerFullName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: development-and-testing
      managedBy: arm-template
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/', variables('databaseFullName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: development-and-testing
      managedBy: arm-template
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('skuName')]"
      tier: "[parameters('skuTier')]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]"
      catalogCollation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      zoneRedundant: false
      readScale: Disabled
      requestedBackupStorageRedundancy: Local

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/AllowAllAzureServices')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
      endIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/DevIP1')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddress1')]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddress1')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/DevIP2')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddress2')]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddress2')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/DevIP3')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddress3')]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddress3')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/DevOfficeIPRange')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devOfficeIpRangeStart')]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devOfficeIpRangeEnd')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/connectionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    properties:
      connectionType: Default

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      retentionDays: 30
      isAzureMonitorTargetEnabled: true

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/transparentDataEncryption
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/', variables('databaseFullName'), '/current')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('sqlServerFullName'), variables('databaseFullName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerFullName'), '/', variables('databaseFullName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('sqlServerFullName'), variables('databaseFullName'))]"
    properties:
      retentionDays: 14
      diffBackupIntervalInHours: 12

outputs:
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"

  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('sqlServerFullName')]"

  databaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('databaseFullName')]"

  connectionString:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerFullName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', variables('databaseFullName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('administratorLogin'), ';Password=', parameters('administratorLoginPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"

  resourceId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('sqlServerFullName'), variables('databaseFullName'))]"

  environment:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('environment')]"
